text: - **LLM distill must stay a non-deterministic *input*** to the graph, never a derived node. [...] - **Wall-clock `now`** ("just now", 90s TTL, NIP-40 expirations) must be modeled as an input — good for replay, but a pervasive mechanical change. [...] - **Architectural boundary & end-state** — *Trellis owns decisions; the host owns observations and effects.* The world's facts (`ProcessExited`, `DistillCompleted`, `RelayPublishAccepted`, `ClockTick`) enter as a single input journal; Trellis derives sessions/status/who/context/outbox/subscriptions; SQLite becomes a durable log + projection store. Raw transcripts/event bodies stay out — pointers and hashes only.
